title: EU Reconsiders MiCA Regulation as Crypto Evolves
message_html: EU Reconsiders MiCA Regulation as Crypto Evolves ...
snippet: European regulators want to know if their 2024 cryptocurrency regulations still apply to the 2026 crypto landscape.
